2605.11889.title: Incentivizing Truthfulness and Collaborative Fairness in Bayesian Learning
2605.11889.paper_summary: Collaborative machine learning involves training high-quality models using datasets from a number of sources. To incentivize sources to share data, existing data valuation methods fairly reward each source based on its data submitted as is. However, as these methods do not verify nor incentivize data truthfulness, the sources can manipulate their data (e.g., by submitting duplicated or noisy data) to artificially increase their valuations and rewards or prevent others from benefiting. This paper presents the first mechanism that provably ensures (F) collaborative fairness and incentivizes (T) truthfulness at equilibrium for Bayesian models. Our mechanism combines semivalues (e.g., Shapley value), which ensure fairness, and a truthful data valuation function (DVF) based on a validation set that is unknown to the sources. As semivalues are influenced by others' data, we introduce an additional condition to prove that a source can maximize its expected data values in coalitions and semivalues by submitting a dataset that captures its true knowledge. Additionally, we discuss the implications and suitable relaxations of (F) and (T) when the mediator has a limited budget for rewards or lacks a validation set. Our theoretical findings are validated on synthetic and real-world datasets.
2605.11889.paper_summary_zh: 協作式機器學習涉及使用來自多個來源的數據集來訓練高品質模型。為了激勵來源共享數據，現有的數據評價方法根據每個來源所提交的數據公平地獎勵每個來源。然而，由於這些方法既不驗證也不激勵數據的真實性，來源可以操縱他們的數據（例如，通過提交重複或噪聲數據）來人為地提高他們的評價和獎勵，或防止其他人受益。本文提出了第一個機制，能夠明確確保（F）協作公平性並在貝葉斯模型中激勵（T）真實性達到均衡。我們的機制結合了半值（例如，Shapley值），這確保了公平性，以及基於來源未知的驗證集的真實數據評價函數（DVF）。由於半值受他人數據的影響，我們引入了一個額外的條件來證明來源可以通過提交捕捉其真實知識的數據集來最大化其在聯盟中的預期數據值和半值。此外，我們討論了當中介的獎勵預算有限或缺乏驗證集時（F）和（T）的含義及適當的放鬆。我們的理論發現已在合成和真實世界數據集上進行驗證。
2605.11889.author: Rachael Hwee Ling Sim et.al.
2605.11889.authors: Rachael Hwee Ling Sim, Jue Fan, Xiao Tian, Xinyi Xu, Patrick Jaillet, Bryan Kian Hsiang Low
